# Rivendell Blade

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

*Item. Weapon.*

---

Attach to a **_Noldor_** or **_Silvan_** character. Restricted.
When attached character attacks an enemy, that enemy gets -2 DEF until the end of the phase.
